programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: TV Patrol Global Edition

programme.title: Tubig To Handle Sat
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: Y Speak 2.0[Live]
programme.desc: It is a revival and modernization of the iconic Philippine youth talk, and debate show Y Speak that originally aired on Studio 23 from 2004 to 2010. The updated version continues to explore how we can positively help shape the character of our young people and, ultimately, the future of our nation. It guides the youth to listen to the past, discern the present, and act for tomorrow.

programme.title: E8 - The Chant Of The Sardine Canning Factories
programme.desc: Douarnenez, 1924. For more than six weeks, two thousand workers from the sardine canning factories went on strike to demand a pay rise. A victorious industrial dispute that marked the town's history. In 2024, one hundred years later, what mark of this strike remains in Douarnenez?

programme.title: E17 - Lentil Salad
programme.desc: Leila Albert opens her kitchen doors to Cindy Fischer, a shepherd turned restaurateur. Cindy concocts a lentil and soft-boiled egg salad with a twist: a Burgundy truffle-infused cream.

programme.title: E8 - Skiing A Couloir
programme.desc: At Lake Louise, Alexis and Thomas attempt to ski a couloir. Before going down, Alexis needs to refine his alpine skiing technique at a resort. It's a chance to discover the history of ski tourism in Canada and its impacts.

E6 - Gangsters
programme.desc: Get inside the toughest gangs that roam the Earth and see what true grit looks like in the wild. Chase a band of marauding locusts, watch the coconut octopus ambush its next meal, and meet a flock of finches who’ve developed a taste for blood.

programme.title: E5 - Fight Club
programme.desc: Step into the ring with nature’s top brawlers, who use violence to get what they need. Watch the cannibalistic Portia spider devour the competition, uncover the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas, and catch an epic neck-whipping giraffe battle.

programme.title: E6 - Gangsters

programme.title: E1 - Origin Stories
programme.desc: Discover how weirdness is baked into some animals’ DNA from birth. Check out the bowerbird’s funky mate-attracting dance moves, the Christmas Island crab’s traffic-dodging prowess, and the sockeye salmon’s incredible uphill swimming skills.

programme.title: E3 - Villains
programme.desc: Meet nature’s most wanted and see why the baddest of the bad don’t get the respect they deserve. Admire the great white shark’s electrical sensors, the razor-sharp limbs of the dead leaf mantis, and the zombie-creating powers of cordyceps fungi.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: It’s spring: the season of courtship and new life. Witness nature awaken from its slumber in many forms, from the blossoms that explode in the rain-soaked desert of Arizona to the fuzzy wood ducklings that leap from their nests.

programme.title: E2 - Summer
programme.desc: Summer brings long, warm days for wildlife to thrive. Watch animals learn new skills, compete for mates, and escape predators as they try to make the most of the short season.

programme.title: E1 - Sammi, Rose, and Casey
programme.desc: Roam across America with a road-tripping chicken and meet a mouse family living in an English garden. Beat arachnophobia with a spider’s help, trek with the guardian of Earth’s last two northern white rhinos, and celebrate more interspecies pals.

programme.title: E2 - Bandit, Max, and George
programme.desc: Learn how cockatoos and platypuses inspired new careers, then explore the shared trauma that bonded a human and an elephant for life. Get playful with 35-year-old George the turkey vulture and say a moving farewell to human-raised kangaroos.

programme.title: E109 - Mica's Robot
programme.desc: Mica doesn't finish his robot in time for the school science fair, so the Marsupilamis squeeze inside and operate it.

programme.title: E104 - Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E603 - Flip This Flip
programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush.

programme.title: E107 - The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: E110 - Smile for the Camera / School invaders
programme.desc: Rosa installs security cameras at the park, and people hate being spied on. // When the Twins take the Marsupilamis to school, Stan spots Twister and claims a poisonous frog is loose to gain access.

programme.title: E124 - Funny Money / Shaking Bad
programme.desc: When Best breaks the last clean plate, rather than do the dishes, Best and Bester head out to buy a brand new one. // Best and Bester decide to make the best milkshake ever, only to find themselves in a bitter contest with Flip Flop.

programme.title: E111 - Tide and Prejudice
programme.desc: The Thundermans are visited by High Tide, the former protector of Secret Shores. But when they explain to him that they are the new superheroes in town, he decides to take back his old role, even if it puts Jinx and Booch in danger.

programme.title: E712 - Party Fowl
programme.desc: When Sergio stays at the Louds, he soon gets into trouble when he doesn't want to hang out with the rest of the pets.

programme.title: E277 - Plane to Sea
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick take Squidward on a plane to a tropical resort.

programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E407 - Present Tense / Any Given Sundae
programme.desc: Convinced that their scrapbook isn't good enough for Dad's birthday, the Loud kids seek out the perfect gift. // Lily hears the parents mention ice cream if the kids are good, so she uses baby smarts to avert sibling disasters

programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school. // Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but she worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: E111 - Where There's a Will, There's a Way / Lost in the Sauce
programme.desc: When the house AC breaks during an extreme heat wave, Will takes it upon himself to protect his family and fix it. // Ellie insists on running Raven Club like a dictatorship, so Jack & Lil quit, and Ellie must save her investigation AND best friends.

programme.title: E245 - Gary's Got Legs / King Plankton

programme.desc: The Peek-a-Boo club heads to Miyakojima for a serious dive. Iori can't join, and a local drinking custom soon turns paradise into chaos.

programme.title: How Ukraine Turned Drones Into An Economic Weapon
programme.desc: Ukraine's war effort is increasingly being shaped by drones, software and a fast-moving defense tech industry built under fire. Nataliia Shapoval from Kyiv School of Economics and Iryna Zabolotna from Brave1 explain how Ukraine is striking deeper into Russia, pressuring oil infrastructure and trying to offset Russia's bigger military machine.

programme.title: How X-Ray Imaging Is Driving A Crash Test Revolution
programme.desc: High-speed X-rays let researchers see exactly what happens during a collision. Also on the show: plastic-eating worms, a sailboat for ocean research, and why women in soccer run farther and play harder than men.

Racing After A Heart Transplant
programme.desc: After suffering two sudden cardiac deaths and a number of severe health complications, 32-year-old Tamara Schwab's life was saved by a heart transplant. She's now vowed not to waste a single minute of her second stint at life and is pushing herself to the limit to compete in the World Transplant Games. But can her body take it?

programme.title: How X-Ray Imaging Is Driving A Crash Test Revolution

programme.title: From Trash To Treasure
programme.desc: Reduce, reuse and recycle - to live a waste free life is the goal of more and more people around the world. But where to start? HER introduces women with creative and innovative ideas on how to consume less and recycle more. And sometimes it's also, about showing that even waste can be turned into something wonderful.

programme.title: Where Everything Disappears

programme.title: Understand The World, One Story At A Time
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter - with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. programme.desc: High-speed X-rays let researchers see exactly what happens during a collision. Also on the show: plastic-eating worms, a sailboat for ocean research, and why women in soccer run farther and play harder than men.

programme.title: Afrobeats Inspire Ugandans To Dance To A Different Tune
programme.desc: In a flood-prone Kampala suburb, singer-songwriter Green Daddy is teaching the next generation to fight climate change. Plus: The cyclist with a vision for Africa's cities.

programme.title: How X-Ray Imaging Is Driving A Crash Test Revolution
programme.desc: High-speed X-rays let researchers see exactly what happens during a collision. Also on the show: plastic-eating worms, a sailboat for ocean research, and why women in soccer run farther and play harder than men.

programme.title: History Goes Interactive: Learning Through Tech
programme.desc: Digital technology unlocks new ways to explore history through VR, AR and games - but social media can oversimplify or distort facts.

programme.desc: In a flood-prone Kampala suburb, singer-songwriter Green Daddy is teaching the next generation to fight climate change. Plus: The cyclist with a vision for Africa's cities.

programme.title: Afrobeats Inspire Ugandans To Dance To A Different Tune
programme.desc: In a flood-prone Kampala suburb, singer-songwriter Green Daddy is teaching the next generation to fight climate change. Plus: The cyclist with a vision for Africa's cities.

programme.title: Experiencing And Understanding The Art World
Racing After A Heart Transplant
programme.desc: After suffering two sudden cardiac deaths and a number of severe health complications, 32-year-old Tamara Schwab's life was saved by a heart transplant. She's now vowed not to waste a single minute of her second stint at life and is pushing herself to the limit to compete in the World Transplant Games. But can her body take it?

programme.title: E114 - The Treasure Hunt / Going Into The Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: E209 - Times Machine
programme.desc: Tim and Tia build a time machine to avoid telling Dad the truth.

programme.title: E805 - Recorders
programme.desc: The children have a music lesson with Madame Gazelle and all learn how to play the recorder.

programme.title: E507 - Ice Cream Monster Machine
programme.desc: Gasquatch invites Blaze and AJ to his ice cream party! But he forgot something important - the ice cream! So, Blaze transforms into an Ice Cream Truck and races to reach Gasquatch's house in time!

programme.title: E214 - The Crew Builds A Pizza Parlor / The Crew Builds An Airport Road
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs a lot of pizzas, fast! But when Speed Meister steps in, the pups have to fix his pizza problem. // When a family can't get to the airport in time on Speed Meister's road, Rubble & Crew has to build a new road before takeoff.

programme.title: E215 - The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center / The Crew Builds A Roller Rink
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: E101 - Catch The Quickatoo / Lost Lorito
programme.desc: Abuela shows Dora her photo album of birds, with one page blank: the Quickatoo. Dora vows to find the Quickatoo and get a picture to complete the album. // Dora and Boots help a baby parrot named Lorito find his Mami, but he can't stop copying Boots!

programme.title: E125 - Barbabravo Is Not Feeling Well / Be Patient Barbabravo...
programme.desc: Following a misadventure, Barbabravo is unable to transform at all. The whole family unites to help him. // Barbabravo can't stay put and is unable to focus one an activity for very long. Barbalala offers to teach him control. Will she succeed?

programme.title: E201 - Moving Mission / Barbabright's Invention
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the 'BAM'.

programme.title: E202 - Princess For A Day / Barbabeau's Adventure
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: E102 - Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: E105 - Moon Cow / Nebulator / Space Bug
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner. // Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure. // Tim and Kai try to photograph the illusive SpaceBug.

programme.title: E117 - The Crew Builds An Observatory / The Crew Builds A Zipline
programme.desc: The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: E105 - The Tenderest Bond Of All / The Orange Empire
programme.desc: While the family makes pottery, Barbabravo and Barbabright try to set the world record for the largest cheese souffle. // The Barbapapas decide to go to the park. While her brother and sisters play , Barbalib can't help to control everything.

programme.title: E106 - It's Only A Mystery... / The Battle
programme.desc: Taking after his favourite detective, Barbabravo looks for a case to solve. Can he solve the mystery of the missing ice statue? // Inspired by their favourite heroes, the Barbababies make costumes. But no heroes are possible without villains...

programme.title: E711 - The Yucky Ducky
programme.desc: When the Yucky Ducky covers Axle City in icky, sticky grossigoo, it's up to Special Mission Blaze to stop her machine and save the world from being grossified... forever!

programme.title: E821 - Roman Day
programme.desc: Granny Pig, Peppa and George have fun dressing up as Romans, making a pebble mosaic and learning a little Latin!

programme.title: E823 - Super Potato Movie
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends visit the cinema for the first time to watch the Super Potato movie!

programme.title: E423 - Pups Save Luke Stars / Pups Save Chicken Day
programme.desc: Katie is going to perform her contest-winning song with Luke Stars! But Luke Stars gets stuck on a mountain ledge on his way to Adventure Bay. // Chickaletta goes missing on Chicken Day! The PAW Patrol have to find her to save the festivites.

programme.title: E120 - Relay Tales
programme.desc: Barbalib, Barbalala and Barbabelle take turns as narrators to tell a story, each one bringing a very personal touch to it.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E18 - Animals
programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E21 - Pak Choi
programme.desc: Pak Choi, who might be known by many names, sings about how she's 'Always Pak To You!'

programme.title: E25 - Aargh! Jelly!
programme.desc: Broccoli shows Supertato her latest art exhibition of jelly sculptures, but jelly is Supertato's secret fear. When Evil Pea finds out, she comes up with an evil idea to beat him.

programme.title: E26 - Veggie Magic
programme.desc: When Evil Pea poses as a magician so that she can use tricks to make the Tato Team 'disappear', Supertato and Carrot create their own magical plan to rescue them.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E26 - El Gran Final
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: E25 - Taxi
programme.desc: Bluey is running a taxi service. Her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who is in a rush to get to the airport. But with unexpected delays, Dad's in danger of missing his flight!

programme.title: E50 - The Key Badge
programme.desc: Roly is digging in the garden when his spade suddenly hits something. It's a key. But what does it do? Duggee has his key badge, they can find out through trial and error.

programme.title: E11 - Himalayan Heroes, Nepal
programme.desc: Hoping to follow in his great-aunt's footsteps, Glitch enlists the help of a sceptical Foz and a friendly yak in order to find a yeti in the Himalayas.

programme.title: E10 - Tulip Fields, Netherlands
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.title: E12 - Shop
programme.desc: Stanley covers Jose at the shop and ends up making too much popcorn. So as not to waste it all, Stanley and his friends put on a film night to screen Little Woo's film.

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.desc: The Squirrel club play games involving animals. The chickens do some rhythmic office work.

programme.title: E20 - The Midnight Badge

programme.desc: Bluey special trilogy episode 1 - Dad is pretending to be an estate agent selling the Grannies' house to Mum, but Janet and Rita do not want to move out. A Dog Year
programme.desc: A 50-something writer in a mid-existential crisis impulsively adopts a collie. The bond between him and the dog transforms in meaningful, unexpected ways.

programme.title: E5 - The Titan Games Trials 5
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. Winners will advance to the ultimate challenge of Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. The male and female competitors who conquer Mt. Olympus will become a Titan, and in the end, the Titans return to battle each other. One woman and one man will be crowned Titan Champions. Dwayne Johnson serves as host and Executive Producer, Liam McHugh and Alex Mendez commentate from the skybox and Cari Champion reports from inside the arena.

programme.title: E15 - Don'T Noc It 'Til You Try It
programme.desc: Slips oversleeps during class and gets trapped in night school.

programme.title: E5 - The Titan Games Trials 5
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by Dwayne Johnson. programme.title: E22 - Camp Kidney Stinks
programme.desc: Lazlo wants everyone to stop showering and get stinky, but Samson's anal -retentive ways stop his 'dirty' plan.

programme.title: E3 - The Big Haggle Hassle
programme.desc: Rodney shows off his haggling expertise at the flea market, but before long he's given away all of Andy's money.

programme.title: E6 - Andy Had A Little Squirrel
programme.desc: The other pets in the pet parade can do lots of cool, exciting tricks, which makes Rodney look bad.

programme.title: E8 - Yer Out!
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J become managers of rival baseball teams, but neither will let Andy play.

programme.title: E11 - Up All Night
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney are determined to stay up all night in order to see the legendary Yellow Flash in the sky.

programme.title: E13 - Islands In The Street
programme.desc: An accident strands Rodney on a deserted island. Except it's the kind of 'island' you find in the street.

programme.title: E14 - Speechless
programme.desc: The night before he's to give an important speech, Mr. J loses his voice while laughing too hard at a silly singing cow movie that Rodney insisted he watch.

programme.title: E16 - Wall Of The Wild
programme.desc: Rodney's attempt to fix the air conditioner goes terribly wrong, leaving him trapped in the walls of the house.

programme.title: E1 - Sick Day

programme.title: La French Touch
programme.desc: Sebastien Martin and his friend Chef Francois Audrin travel through Kochi Prefecture, visiting local farms and wineries, discovering inspiration from the producers' commitment and unique food culture.

programme.title: E5 - Senior Cyst-Izen
programme.desc: Anthony is trying to move on from his troubled past, but his huge thigh lump is holding him back. Mary has a mysterious 70-year-old bump that amazes Drs. Lee and Tomassian.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: E16 - Hoisin Sloppy Janes On Bao Buns
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece kicks off this incredible meal with crispy purple yam jojos, inspired by the Pacific Northwest. Coated in oil and a seasoned flour mixture, they're baked to perfection.

programme.desc: The sheep are hooked on Trico’s soppy romance novel. Wolf takes advantage of their sentimentality to try and poach a few sheep by playing the part of the jilted lover, fooling a sympathetic Wanda into letting him mingle with the flock.

programme.desc: In order to join the Robot Club, Mo must solve a puzzle. So, he asks for the power of glue, but it works too well, to the point of making everything he touches stick to him.

programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: Love 86
programme.desc: A strict mother tries to marry off her daughters, Leena and Isha, to two brothers from a well-off family, but they prefer two down-and-out thieves.

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: E4 - Green Iguanas
programme.desc: A once sought-after pet, the green iguanas escaped their terrariums in the 60's and found the Florida eco-system to be a much more hospitable environment to call home. Free to roam the canals, parks, and suburban neighborhoods, these pets-gone-feral have exploded in both size and population, causing hundreds of millions of dollars of damage a year in Florida. Urban hunter Michael Onega is doing his part to clean up the environment by removing as many iguanas as possible, limiting their population spread. The singular goal - to make sure the iguanas never establish a healthy breeding population in the Everglades. Yia joins Michael and his trusty Labrador Scout on Michael's mud boat, as they patrol the canals in Michael's backyard. The only thing better than Scout retrieving the fallen iguanas, are BBQed iguana and iguana tacos cooked up in Michael's backyard.

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam
programme.desc: Off to Vietnam next, Rooftop and Catfish embark on what may be their most dangerous visit yet. The BMX bikers start their journey relatively tame with a shot of snake blood. However, things quickly escalate from there with the most intense game of frogger they’ve ever played in the Vietnamese streets. From a hospital visit and racing through the Vietcong tunnels to trying fertilized baby bird eggs and relaxing in a boiling hot spring, nothing can prepare the duo for the ending of their trip heading to the demilitarized zone to detonate bombs. After this trip to Vietnam, what more heart-racing adventures and Rooftop and Catfish possibly find?

programme.title: E11 - Horns Up
programme.desc: Billy and his partner Shaun respond to a frat house where an animal prank is no longer funny. Then Billy saves a family from an infestation of flying squirrels.

programme.title: E6 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E10 - Southern Discomfort
programme.desc: An inner-city youth mentor, who is scared of the wild, joins Bear Grylls for an adventure outside his comfort zone. Brandon’s mission is to face his fears and inspire kids in his community.

programme.title: E33
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Blind Detective
programme.desc: The crime-solver in the Police Crime Unit CHONG was forced to quit four years ago after he got blind accidentally and since then has worked as a private eye on cold cases to earn rewards for a living. He has spent nine months investigating the suspect for the Mongkok Acid Attack Case but was caught in a dire situation during an operation. Fortunately he was saved by a woman detective TUNG in the nick of time...

programme.title: What Women Want
programme.desc: Sun is not exactly the ideal husband, father or son, but family takes the backseat against career. As the top brass of the leading ad agency, his mind is only fixed on being promoted to the executive creative director post. But the announcement comes and Sun is beaten by a new colleague Ly, renowned as the Iron Lady in the ad industry. The boss believes Ly would bring a competitive edge for the agency - the female perspective. Sun and Ly are at loggerheads at first sight, and she gives him an assignment - takes home a box of female hygiene products, and present an ad idea the next morning. That night, Sun is brainstorming in the bathtub when he accidentally drops a lamp in the water. The electric shock knocks him out, and when he wakes up in the hospital, he realizes he has a new gift - he can really hear what women think! By listening to the inner thoughts of the opposite sex, Sun quickly wins the hearts and trust of all women...

programme.title: Dreams Of Glory, A Boxer's Story.
programme.desc: Silent classmate Ming, an ambitious boxing addict, decides to learn boxing in Thailand after a technical knockdown in a contest which he was confident of winning. By witnessing the rigorous training on the spot, he not only develops the physique of a boxer but enhances the dignity and dauntless spirit of the boxer in a tournament. Tak is another young upcoming boxer. He learned Chinese martial arts from his father since childhood. Not wanting to be cooped up in the narrow confines of boxing only, he undergoes hard training in Thai boxing in a gym, hoping to widen the boxing horizon...

programme.title: E9 - 秦霄賢語音撒嬌王鶴棣
programme.desc: 由黃明昊、哈妮克孜、李宏毅、秦霄賢、趙小棠等嘉賓組成「探玩行動派」，以全新升級的劇情式玩法解鎖城市新風貌；他們將以最年輕、最活力的方式穿越各大城市，發揮創新的思維，創造出全新的有趣玩法。
